a pirate captain's duty
вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ

рқ–Ҳрқ–”рқ–“рқ–ҷрқ–Ҡрқ–“рқ–ҷ рқ–ңрқ–Ҷрқ–—рқ–“рқ–Һрқ–“рқ–Ң вҖ” period typical racism, sexism and shitty behaviour. Pirate behaviour is icky, so expect questionable behaviour like murder, SA or threats of violence. The AI may generate some wild responses as a result (based on my tests). Please avoid if any of these are a trigger.

As a noblewoman who was set to marry a man three times her age, you decide to take your life into your own hands and escape before you die like your beloved fiance's past wives. Lucky for you, a charming, rogue pirate was willing to ferry you away for a good price.

OTб•јEб–Ү б’ӘIб‘ҺKб”•
вЁ Тү .. рқҗ’рқҗ“ рқҗӮрқҗҖрқҗ‘рқҗғ вҳ… рқҗӮрқҗҖрқҗ‘рқҗ‘рқҗғ вҳ… рқҗҒрқҗҺрқҗ“ рқҗ‘рқҗ„рқҗҗрқҗ”рқҗ„рқҗ’рқҗ“рқҗ’
